findings.one_line: The node defines the SS-ID target as do(A=a,S=empty), but the core-level target/functional instead use a natural S=empty event and a pi(empty)-weighted conditional; reconcile these objects and state the observed-law map for the same target.

The named SS-ID target is specific, but the theorem supplies only one four-vertex trace and no non-degenerate observable-law witness or generic final-return family; with the closest completeness/data-fusion comparators (including Kivva et al.) not substantively positioned, the claimed field-level novelty is not established.
